hero.title: South Florida's Premier Commercial Real Estate
hero.subtitle: Retail Sites International, Inc. has been proudly serving all of South Florida's commercial real estate needs for over 40 exceptional years.

about.title: About Us
paragraphs: RSI is comprised of two commercial real estate brokerage companies known internationally since 1976, as Restaurant Sites, Inc. and as Retail Sites International, Inc. The Personnel of both Retail Sites International, Inc. and Restaurant Sites, Inc. have extensive experience in all phases of retail and restaurant brokerage and Tenant Representation including: sales; leases; sale lease backs; 1031 exchanges; market surveys; demographics; zoning and utility information; traffic counts; and competition maps.

For over forty years the brokers and staff of RSI have exhibited a unique expertise in site location and selection work, and Tenant Representation, for national, regional and local retail and restaurant companies. In addition, RSI provides in depth services to real estate and shopping center developers and builders, assisting in every aspect of site procurement from initial market surveys through site identification, purchase and acquisition, and anchor and local retail and restaurant leasing.

The knowledge, professionalism, and experience of the staff of RSI will benefit any purchaser, investor, and lessee of retail or restaurant properties or developers of real estate (retail, residential and/or mixed-use) in their search for the right location throughout Florida.

services.title: Tenant Representation
services.description: Site location and selection work for national, regional and local retail and restaurant companies. Including market surveys, demographics, and competition mapping.

services.title: Developer Services
services.description: Assisting real estate and shopping center developers in every aspect of site procurement, from initial market surveys to purchase, acquisition, and anchor leasing.

services.title: Investment Sales & 1031 Exchanges
services.description: Expertise in the sale of existing, net leased and improved properties, as well as 1031 sales and exchanges for buyers nationwide.

services.title: Land Sales & Build-to-Suit
services.description: Sale of undeveloped land of all sizes to build-to-suit, shopping center and mixed-use developers.

team.name: Nathan Werner
team.bio: Mr. Nathan A. Werner is President and Broker of both Restaurant Sites, Inc and Retail Sites, Inc. He graduated from the University of South Florida, Tampa, Florida in 1974 with a Bachelor of Arts in English and Humanities. He joined Restaurant Sites, Inc in March, 1977 and formed Retail Sites International, Inc in 1983 with founding partners Murray Werner and Stan Bell (both now deceased). Nathan Werner has exclusively represented Darden Restaurants (Olive Garden, Seasons 52, Red Lobster, Smokey Bones Barbeque and Grill, Bahama Breeze) since joining RSI in 1977. He is a long standing member of the International Council of Shopping Centers (ICSC). Mr. Werner has held a real estate Broker’s License in the State of Florida since 1980. He has significant expertise and experience with contract and lease negotiation; market surveys and demographics; site selection and negotiation process for all forms of commercial retail and restaurant brokerage including outparcel sales and leases; in-line retail leasing; sale of undeveloped land of all sizes to build-to-suit, shopping center and mixed use developers; and the sale of existing, net leased and improved properties and 1031 sales and exchanges. Mr. Werner has also served as consultant to different county agencies and retail and restaurant companies over the years, providing advice and serving as an expert witness.

team.name: Bill Bymel
team.bio: Mr. Bymel focuses his practice on developmental site selection in Palm Beach, Martin and Saint Lucie Counties. He has extensive experience initiating and negotiating retail and restaurant leases both in shopping centers and on vacant land throughout South Florida. In his tenure with RSI, Mr. Bymel has developed a track record for excellence and integrity. His clients include numerous national tenants and REITs as well as local developers and land owners. He has also been involved in a number of 1031 exchanges with buyers from around the United States. Prior to joining RSI, Mr. Bymel served as the Qualifying Broker of a residential real estate firm in Fort Lauderdale. In that capacity, he hired, trained, and managed an office of more than thirty associates. Mr. Bymel’s experience includes drafting and negotiating purchase, sale, and lease agreements. He is familiar with construction, design, zoning, and land use matters. Bill is a member of the International Council of Shopping Centers (ICSC), CCIM, NNNex, National and Florida Boards of Realtors. Bill graduated with a B.F.A from New York University.

team.name: Paul Werner
team.bio: Paul Werner was born and raised in Fort Lauderdale, FL. He has immense pride in the development and progress of the city he was raised in. Since he started his career in real estate he has made it his mission to know as much as possible about projects being developed and operating in South Florida. During Paul’s time with RSI, he has specialized in tenant representation. He handles himself with loyalty to his clients and makes them his first priority. His clients include numerous national tenants, local developers, franchisees, small business owners as well as landowners. He has also been involved in a number of 1031 exchanges with buyers from around the United States. Prior to joining RSI, Mr. Werner attended the University of South Florida in Tampa Florida. Paul’s experience includes drafting and negotiating purchase, sale, and lease agreements. He is familiar with construction, design, zoning, and land use matters.

team.name: Joel Chester
team.bio: Joel Chester was born in Houston, TX but was raised in Broward County. Seeing the growth and development of South Florida from a national vacation and retirement hotspot to an international hub for major businesses and corporations has left quite the impression on him. He not only wants to be a witness but a participant in the continued growth of South Florida. Prior to joining RSI, Mr. Chester graduated from the University of Florida with a Bachelor of Arts in History. He later pursued certifications in frontend and backend programming for Javascript and Java from McFatter Technical College. He also has experience as a paralegal working at a Litigation Law Firm, with some cases related to real estate law. In particular permits, zoning and construction. He is a licensed Florida Real Estate Salesman.

team.name: Beverly Garcia
team.bio: Beverly Garcia attended Florida Atlantic University, which is where she obtained her Bachelors degree in Multimedia Journalism with a focus in Broadcasting. She also has a degree in Journalism and mass communications. Beverly has completed internships at MTV Tr3s and iHeart Radio’s Y-100. Beverly previously worked as a contributor for DISfunkshion Magazine, a high-fashion publication that is distributed worldwide. She was also a writer for My City Eats Magazine, the content editor of HypeGirls.com and the host of Owl Radio’s "The Scoop." Beverly is currently the director of communication at RSI. She focuses her attention on social media and the RSI website.
